description: This commands hides or un-hides all links in the range. By default, commands that use a range filter will skip hidden objects. This can be overruled with the use-hidden keyword in the range specification.

6.0.description: This commands hides or un-hides all links in the range. By default, commands that use a range filter will skip hidden objects. This can be overruled with the use-hidden keyword in the range specification.

keywords.name: b
keywords.description: if a boolean type is specified, and if on, it hides all links in the range. If off, it un-hides (or shows) all links in the range, and the use-hidden keyword is applied to the range implicitly. on is the default if no keyword is given.

keywords.name: undo
keywords.description: this will reverse the operation of the last structure link hide command. FLAC3D keeps a maximum undo stack of size 12.

keywords.name: undo
keywords.description: this will reverse the operation of the last structure link hide command. FLAC3D keeps a maximum undo stack of size 12.
